title: Turborepo Monorepo with Shared Packages
description: Complete route for a Turborepo-managed monorepo: apps (Next.js), shared packages (UI, config, types), type-safe API layer, database ORM, testing, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Scaffold a Turborepo monorepo with pnpm workspaces and build pipeline caching
Add a Next.js application inside apps/ with App Router and TypeScript
Configure shared Tailwind CSS v4 preset across all apps
Create a shared packages/ui with shadcn/ui components consumed by all apps
Add Drizzle ORM in a shared packages/db package with schema and migration scripts
Set up tRPC router in a shared packages/api package for type-safe cross-app RPC
Add authentication (Auth.js or Clerk) configured for the monorepo's apps
Set up a shared ESLint flat config in packages/eslint-config consumed by all workspaces
Configure Vitest with a shared setup across all packages
Configure CI with Turborepo remote caching to skip unchanged packages
Deploy each Next.js app independently from the monorepo using Vercel's monorepo support
